---
toc: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: arluxis-styles.css
---

```{=html}
<!-- Fonts -->
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,300;1,400;1,500;1,600;1,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

<!-- favicon -->
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/assets/favicon-96x96.png" sizes="96x96" />
<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/assets/favicon.svg" />
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="/assets/favicon.ico" />
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="/assets/apple-touch-icon.png" />
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="ARLUXIS" />
<link rel="manifest" href="/assets/site.webmanifest" />

<!-- Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="navbar">
  <div class="nav-container">
    <a href="index.html" class="back-link">← Back to Home</a>
    <img src="icons/logo_arluxis_short.png" alt="ARLUXIS logo" class="nav-logo">
    <a href="https://www.instagram.com/arluxis/" target="_blank" class="instagram-link">
      <img src="icons\instagram_white.png" alt="Instagram" class="social-icon">
        Instagram
    </a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- Hero Section -->
<section class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="hero-kicker">BY ARTHUR DECLERCQ</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title">ARLUXIS</h1>
    <h2 class="hero-subtitle">Photography Portfolio</h2>
    <p class="hero-description">A personal visual journal of <span class="hero-highlight">movement</span>, atmosphere, and everyday scenes worth remembering.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Gallery Section -->
<section class="gallery-section">

  <!-- Landscape -->
  <h3 class="gallery-category-title">Landscape</h3>
  <div class="gallery-container">
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF0336.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF0336.jpg" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF0336</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF0451.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF0451.jpg" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF0451</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF0671.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF0671.jpg" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF0671</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF0822.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF0822.jpg" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF0822</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF0928.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF0928.jpg" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF0928</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF2595.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF2595.JPG" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF2595</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF2601.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF2601.JPG" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF2601</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF2623.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF2623.JPG" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF2623</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF2716.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF2716.JPG" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF2716</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF4227.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF4227.JPG" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF4227</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF4560.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF4560.jpg" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF4560</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF5781-2.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF5781-2.jpg" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF5781-2</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/landscape_photography/DSCF5883-2.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/landscape_photography/DSCF5883-2.jpg" alt="Landscape" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF5883-2</p></div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Sports -->
  <h3 class="gallery-category-title">Sports</h3>
  <div class="gallery-container">
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF1152.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF1152.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF1152</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF1158.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF1158.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF1158</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF1175.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF1175.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF1175</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF3431-2.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF3431-2.jpg" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF3431-2</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF3586.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF3586.jpg" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF3586</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF4265-2.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF4265-2.jpg" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF4265-2</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF4309-2.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF4309-2.jpg" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF4309-2</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF4312-2.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF4312-2.jpg" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF4312-2</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF7835.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF7835.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF7835</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF7973.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF7973.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF7973</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF8051.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF8051.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF8051</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF8427.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF8427.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF8427</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF8837.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF8837.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF8837</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF8840.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF8840.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF8840</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/sports_photography/DSCF8854.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/sports_photography/DSCF8854.JPG" alt="Sports" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF8854</p></div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Street -->
  <h3 class="gallery-category-title">Street</h3>
  <div class="gallery-container">
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF1058.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF1058.jpg" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF1058</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF1106.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF1106.jpg" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF1106</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF1634.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF1634.JPG" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF1634</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF1775.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF1775.JPG" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF1775</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF2414.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF2414.JPG" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF2414</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF3901.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF3901.jpg" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF3901</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF3907.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF3907.jpg" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF3907</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF3916.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF3916.jpg" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF3916</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF3922.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF3922.jpg" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF3922</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF3931.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF3931.jpg" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF3931</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF3933.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF3933.jpg" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF3933</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF4003.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF4003.JPG" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF4003</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF4010.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF4010.JPG" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF4010</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF7925.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF7925.JPG" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF7925</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF7927.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF7927.JPG" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF7927</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF8216.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF8216.JPG" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF8216</p></div></div>
    <div class="photo-item"><img src="images/arluxis_webp/street_photography/DSCF3966.webp" data-fullres="images/arluxis/street_photography/DSCF3966.jpg" alt="Street" class="photo-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async" fetchpriority="low"><div class="photo-overlay"><p class="photo-caption">DSCF3966</p></div></div>
  </div>

</section>

<!-- About Section -->
<section class="about-portfolio-section">
  <div class="about-portfolio-content">
    <h3>About ARLUXIS</h3>
    <p>Recently embarked on a photography journey, capturing moments that blend science, nature, and everyday beauty. Follow along on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/arluxis/" target="_blank" class="inline-link">Instagram</a> for more.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Footer -->
<footer class="portfolio-footer">
  <p>© 2025 Arthur Declercq | <a href="index.html" class="footer-link">Back to Main Site</a></p>
</footer>

<!-- Lightbox for full-size images -->
<div id="lightbox" class="lightbox">
  <span class="lightbox-close">&times;</span>
  <img class="lightbox-content" id="lightbox-img">
  <div class="lightbox-caption" id="lightbox-caption"></div>
</div>

<!-- JavaScript for lightbox functionality -->
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const lightbox = document.getElementById('lightbox');
    const lightboxImg = document.getElementById('lightbox-img');
    const lightboxCaption = document.getElementById('lightbox-caption');
    const closeBtn = document.querySelector('.lightbox-close');
    const photoItems = document.querySelectorAll('.photo-item');

    // Open lightbox when clicking on a photo
    photoItems.forEach(item => {
      item.addEventListener('click', function() {
        const img = this.querySelector('.photo-img');
        const caption = this.querySelector('.photo-caption');
        
        lightbox.style.display = 'flex';
        lightboxImg.src = img.dataset.fullres || img.src;
        lightboxImg.alt = img.alt;
        lightboxCaption.textContent = caption ? caption.textContent : '';
        
        // Prevent body scroll when lightbox is open
        document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      });
    });

    // Close lightbox when clicking the X button
    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
      lightbox.style.display = 'none';
      document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
    });

    // Close lightbox when clicking outside the image
    lightbox.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      if (e.target === lightbox) {
        lightbox.style.display = 'none';
        document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
      }
    });

    // Close lightbox with Escape key
    document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      if (e.key === 'Escape' && lightbox.style.display === 'flex') {
        lightbox.style.display = 'none';
        document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
      }
    });
  });
</script>

```
